item.title: 特朗普在与派拉蒙的竞购战最激烈时买入奈飞和华纳兄弟债券
item.description: 根据政府披露文件显示，在流媒体巨头奈飞与派拉蒙天空舞公司争夺收购华纳兄弟探索公司未果的三个月里，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普购入了价值逾110万美元的奈飞债券。【原文：U.S. President Donald Trump bought more than $1.1 million of Netflix bonds over the last three months as the streaming giant unsuccessfully fought Paramount Skydance to ​buy Warner Bros Discovery , according to government disclosures.】

item.title: 船运公司地中海航运公司（MSC）宣布实施紧急燃油附加费
item.description: 地中海航运公司（MSC）周一宣布，对所有从地中海和黑海运往印度次大陆、红海及东非的货物征收紧急燃油附加费。【原文：Shipping company MSC on Monday announced emergency fuel ​surcharges on all cargo ‌from the Mediterranean and Black Sea to the Indian sub-continent, ​Red Sea and ​East Africa.】

item.title: Live Nation达成美国反垄断案和解
item.description: 据周一的法庭听证会透露，Live Nation娱乐公司已与美国司法部达成拟议和解协议。【原文：Live ​Nation Entertainment ‌has ​reached ​a proposed ⁠settlement ​with ​the U.S. Justice ​Department, ​according to ‌a ⁠court hearing ​on ​Monday.】

item.title: 亚马逊旗下Zoox公司将在亚利桑那州设立指挥中心，并将测试范围扩展至达拉斯和凤凰城。
item.description: 亚马逊旗下自动驾驶出租车公司Zoox正将测试范围扩展至达拉斯和凤凰城，并在亚利桑那州设立车队运营指挥中心，旨在扩大其在美国竞争日益激烈的自动驾驶出租车市场的业务版图。【原文：Amazon's robotaxi unit Zoox is expanding testing to ‌Dallas and Phoenix and launching a command hub for fleet operations in Arizona, as it looks to widen its footprint in the U.S.'s increasingly competitive autonomous taxi market.】

item.title: 微软携手Anthropic推出Copilot Cowork，加速推进AI智能助手发展
item.description: 微软正将Anthropic的人工智能技术整合至其Copilot服务中，以满足对自主智能体日益增长的需求。此前数周，这家初创企业的新工具曾引发软件股抛售潮。【原文：Microsoft is adding Anthropic's AI technology to its Copilot service to tap growing demand for autonomous agents, weeks after the startup's ​new tools sparked a selloff in software stocks.】

item.title: 沃尔玛旗下Flipkart将总部迁至印度，为首次公开募股做准备
item.description: 沃尔玛旗下印度电商公司Flipkart周一宣布，已将控股公司从新加坡迁至印度，为其在该国计划中的股票市场上市铺平道路。【原文：Walmart's Indian e-commerce firm Flipkart has shifted its holding company to India from Singapore, ​the company said on Monday, paving the ‌way for its planned stock market listing in the country.】

item.title: 中东冲突使2026年共识交易逆转
item.description: 中东地区不断升级的战争令投资者开始质疑2026年最热门的交易策略和投资主题，全球股市应声下跌，美元汇率飙升，交易员们纷纷缩减对美联储降息的押注。【原文：The escalating war in the Middle East has investors questioning some of 2026's most popular trades and themes, with global equities slumping, the dollar jumping and traders scaling back their bets for rate cuts from the Federal Reserve.】

item.title: 特朗普兄弟支持的Aureus公司将与无人机制造商Powerus合并
item.description: 由美国总统唐纳德·特朗普之子支持的高尔夫俱乐部公司奥瑞斯绿道控股宣布，将与Powerus合并，此项交易旨在推动这家无人机技术公司上市。【原文：Aureus Greenway Holdings , a golf club company backed by the sons of U.S. President Donald Trump, said it ​will merge with Powerus in a deal designed to ‌take the drone technology company public.】

item.title: 尽管北京方面存在安全担忧，中国深圳仍通过补贴支持OpenClaw人工智能公司
item.description: 深圳龙岗区宣布将围绕OpenClaw构建产业生态，该人工智能代理程序在中国迅速普及，凸显其快速应用态势。尽管监管机构警告称该工具访问个人数据存在安全风险，但其发展势头不减。【原文：Shenzhen's Longgang district has announced measures ​to build an industry around OpenClaw, a fast-spreading AI agent in China, underscoring its ‌rapid adoption even as regulators warn of security risks linked to the tool's access to personal data.】

item.title: 恩智浦半导体中国宣布实现12英寸晶圆技术突破，与荷兰总部的紧张关系持续
item.description: 荷兰芯片制造商恩智浦旗下中国子公司周一宣布，已成功实现12英寸晶圆双极分立器件的小批量生产，尽管该公司中国分部与荷兰总部之间的纠纷仍在持续。【原文：Dutch chipmaker Nexperia's Chinese subsidiary ​on Monday said it ‌has successfully achieved small-batch production of 12-inch ​wafer bipolar discrete ​devices, even as disputes between the ⁠Chinese unit and ​the Dutch headquarters drag ​on.】

item.title: 加州锂业公司将通过47亿美元SPAC交易上市
item.description: 加州锂业公司Controlled Thermal Resources周一宣布，将通过与空白支票公司Plum Acquisition Corp IV合并，在美国实现47亿美元的上市。【原文：California lithium ​company Controlled ‌Thermal Resources ​will ​go public in ⁠the ​United States ​through a $4.7 billion ​merger ​with blank-check firm ‌Plum ⁠Acquisition Corp IV , the ​companies ​said ⁠on ​Monday.】

item.title: ABB携手英伟达提升工厂机器人训练水平
item.description: ABB机器人业务部门已与英伟达达成合作，旨在缩小工业机器人在虚拟仿真中的表现与实际工厂车间运行表现之间的差距，两家公司周一宣布。【原文：ABB's robotics business has partnered with Nvidia to narrow the ‌gap between how industrial robots perform in virtual simulations and how they behave on factory floors, the companies said on Monday.】

item.title: YouTube、TikTok正与印尼政府就儿童社交媒体屏蔽问题展开磋商
item.description: TikTok和视频平台YouTube正就印尼政府计划于本月下旬起禁止16岁以下儿童访问社交媒体一事与印尼政府进行磋商，公司官员周一表示。【原文：TikTok and video platform YouTube are in discussions with Indonesia's government about its plan to block social media access ​for children under 16 starting later this month, company ‌officials said on Monday.】

item.title: 通用电气航空将向美国追加投资10亿美元
item.description: 通用电气航空公司周一宣布，今年将再向其美国制造基地和供应商网络投资10亿美元。【原文：GE ​Aerospace said ‌on ​Monday ​it will ⁠invest ​another $1 ​billion in ​its ​U.S. manufacturing sites ‌and ⁠supplier base ​this ​year.】

item.title: 伊朗战争加剧通胀担忧，引发市场押注央行加息
item.description: 随着伊朗战争推高能源成本并重燃新一轮通胀浪潮的阴影，欧洲各国央行周一面临市场压力，要求其提高利率。【原文：Central banks across Europe came under market pressure on Monday to lift interest rates as the war in Iran drove up ​energy costs and revived the spectre of another inflation wave.】

item.title: 早盘竞价：油价面临三位数困境
item.description: 当今美国及全球市场中真正重要的因素【原文：What matters in U.S. and global markets today】

item.title: 独家：沙特阿美削减两个油田产量
item.description: 据两名消息人士周一透露，沙特石油巨头沙特阿美已开始削减其两个油田的产量。此前，因美以对伊朗开战及随后对霍尔木兹海峡的袭击，这条关键水道陷入瘫痪。【原文：Saudi oil giant Aramco has begun cutting output at two of its oilfields, two sources said on Monday, after the vital Strait of Hormuz was choked by the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran ​and subsequent attacks on the waterway.】

item.title: 英国改革党领袖奈杰尔·法拉奇投资比特币购买公司
item.description: 民粹主义政党改革英国党领袖奈杰尔·法拉奇已投资总部位于伦敦的Stack BTC公司，该公司致力于收购英国小型企业并将剩余资本投入比特币，一份声明于周一表示。【原文：Nigel Farage, leader of the populist Reform UK party, has invested in Stack BTC , a London-based company aimed at acquiring small British companies and investing surplus capital ​into bitcoin, a statement said on Monday.】

item.title: Hims股价飙升，因传闻与诺和诺德达成合作或终结法律纠纷
item.description: 周一盘前交易中，Hims & Hers股价上涨逾50%，此前有报道称诺和诺德计划在其远程医疗平台上销售减肥药物，这标志着两家公司之间的纠纷可能即将结束。【原文：Hims & Hers' shares were up over 50% in premarket trading on Monday following reports Novo Nordisk plans to sell ​its weight-loss drugs on the telehealth firm's platform, signaling ‌a potential end to the dispute between the two companies.】

item.title: 能源冲击拖累股市，散户投资者化身逢低买盘
item.description: 交易员和经销商表示，亚洲散户正大量借入资金注入经纪账户，既为追高油价和能源价格，也为抄底下跌的股票。【原文：Retail traders in Asia are loading up on borrowed money to fund purchases in their brokerage accounts, traders and dealers said, as they chase oil and energy ​prices higher and scoop up sinking stocks.】

item.title: 中国实施四年来最大幅零售燃油价格上限上调，伊朗战争持续发酵
item.description: 中国周一上调了零售汽油和柴油的最高限价，涨幅为2022年3月以来最大。此前因美以对伊朗开战导致国际油价飙升。【原文：China raised regulated ceiling prices for retail gasoline and diesel in the sharpest ​increase since March 2022 on Monday, following a surge in ‌international oil prices due to the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran.】

item.title: 荷兰警告：俄罗斯支持的黑客入侵官员和记者的Signal及WhatsApp账户
item.description: 荷兰两家情报机构周一警告称，俄罗斯支持的黑客已发起全球网络攻击行动，试图入侵政府官员、军事人员及记者使用的Signal和WhatsApp账户。【原文：Russian-backed hackers have launched a global ​cyber campaign to gain access to Signal and WhatsApp accounts used ‌by officials, military personnel and journalists, two intelligence agencies in the Netherlands warned on Monday.】

item.title: 在儿童网络安全法规浪潮中，年龄验证技术日趋成熟
item.description: 多年来，科技公司成功抵御了儿童安全倡导者要求其采取更多措施阻止儿童使用其服务的压力，声称技术限制将使任何限制青少年访问的尝试变得不切实际、范围过广或存在安全风险。【原文：For years, tech companies successfully resisted pressure from child safety advocates to do more to keep kids off their services, claiming technical limitations would make any attempt to restrict access for teens impractical, overly broad or a security risk.】

item.title: 英伟达支持的英国人工智能公司Nscale完成20亿美元融资
item.description: 英伟达支持的英国人工智能公司Nscale周一宣布，已完成20亿美元融资，公司估值达146亿美元。【原文：Nvidia-backed ‌British ​artificial ​intelligence ⁠group ​Nscale ​has raised $2 ​billion ​at a ‌valuation ⁠of $14.6 ​billion, ​the ⁠company ​said ​on ⁠Monday.】

item.title: 伊朗战争持续发酵，华尔街期货暴跌，油价逼近120美元引发通胀担忧
item.description: 美国股指期货周一暴跌逾1%，而油价飙升，加剧了通胀担忧，因中东地区敌对行动未见缓和迹象。【原文：U.S. stock index futures tumbled ​more than 1% on Monday, while oil prices soared, exacerbating inflation fears as hostilities in the ‌Middle East showed no sign of abating.】

item.title: 《Expansion》称阿波罗本周将完成收购马德里竞技股份
item.description: 据西班牙《扩展报》周一援引消息人士报道，美国基金公司阿波罗旗下的体育投资部门阿波罗体育资本将于3月12日完成对西甲俱乐部马德里竞技55%股权的收购。【原文：U.S. fund Apollo's sports investment ​arm Apollo Sports ‌Capital will close the acquisition of 55% ​of Spanish football ​club Atletico Madrid on ⁠March 12, Spanish ​newspaper Expansion said ​on Monday citing sources.】

item.title: 从东京到悉尼，债券价格暴跌，油价突破115美元大关
item.description: 全球债券周一集体下跌，因美国与以色列对伊朗的战争迅速恶化，推动油价飙升至每桶115美元以上，加剧了投资者对通胀风险的担忧及其对利率前景的影响。【原文：Bonds across ​the globe sank on Monday as a rapidly worsening U.S.-Israeli war with Iran pushed oil prices well above $115 per ‌barrel, spurring investor fears over inflation risks and what it could mean for the interest rate outlook.】

item.title: 安捷伦以9.5亿美元全现金交易收购Biocare Medical
item.description: 安捷伦科技公司周一宣布，将以9.5亿美元全现金交易收购临床病理学公司Biocare Medical。【原文：Life ​sciences firm ‌Agilent Technologies ​said ​on Monday ⁠that ​it ​will acquire clinical ​pathology ​firm Biocare Medical ‌in ⁠an all-cash ​deal ​valued ⁠at $950 million.】

item.title: 伊朗冲突冲击石油产量与出口，油价飙升
item.description: 消息人士周一称，沙特阿拉伯已开始减产石油，成为最新受美以对伊战争影响的海湾产油国。该战争已导致该地区船舶交通中断，周一油价因此飙升近30%，至每桶119美元。【原文：Saudi Arabia has begun oil output cuts, sources said on Monday, becoming the latest ​Gulf producer impacted by the U.S. and Israeli war on Iran which has halted ship traffic in the region and ‌sent oil prices up nearly 30% to $119 a barrel on Monday.】

item.title: 激进股东威胁迫使日本企业解除交叉持股
item.description: 来自活动人士的压力，或对成为其攻击目标的担忧，正推动日本企业加速推进公司治理改革，逐步解除支撑企业关系数十年的交叉持股结构。【原文：Pressure from activists, or the fear of being targeted by them, is pushing Japanese ​companies to accelerate governance reforms by unwinding the cross-shareholdings that have underpinned relationships for decades.】
